title: Bridge Essay: Lack of action monitoring as a prerequisite for habitual and chunked behavior: B

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.

**Lack of action monitoring as aprerequisite for habitual and chunked behavior: Behavioral and neural correlates.**. iScience.. PMID: 36636348. DOI: 10.1016/j.isci.2022.105818. We previously reported the rapid development of habitual behavior in adiscrete-trials instrumental task in which lever insertion and retraction act as reward-predictive cues delineating sequence execution. Here we asked whether lever cues or performance variables reflective of skill and automaticity might account for habitual behavior in male rats.
